title: My 600-Lb. Life
desc: Chris believes that restrictions on his mobility due to his weight are affecting his relationship with his daughter. He wants to get his life back on track and seeks help from his mother.

title: Haunted Towns
desc: The team investigates Gettysburg, Pennsylvania, site of the bloodiest battle of the Civil War, and try to make contact with the souls of these fallen American soldiers.

title: Prophets of Science Fiction
desc: In `Frankenstein', Mary Shelley imagines man creating life in a laboratory. Is her masterpiece a prophecy of progress or a warning against science running amok?

title: How Do They Do It?
desc: Many items that make up the modern world are the result of sophisticated engineering and production processes. How do they do it?

title: You Have Been Warned
desc: A look at the internet's Most Valuable Players in science. Featuring a brave sportsman skiing behind a supercar and people pulling cars with their teeth!

title: Factory Made
desc: How to make all kinds of products, from the most common to the most complex.

title: Food Factory
desc: A behind-the-scenes tour of production lines at food factories producing the most popular foods.

desc: Philip K Dick inspired `Blade Runner' and his work confronts readers with the question: `What is reality?' Hollywood notables and scientists explore his lasting influence.
